title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Merck India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Merck India
jsonLd.description:
Merck India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Surat office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Merck India:
Merck India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Merck India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
